items.text: Extremely Compact Secure Combo Lock. (Best Combo Lock) Redstone Device Map This is my extremely compact and secure combination lock. It only has one single lever but allows for 33 million different combinations.A more in dept video of this build will follow soon: In the video I will also show you how simple it is to set your own combination. How to set your own combination: www.youtube.com/watch?v=qE6x5A4bmbo ------------------------------------------------ Dimensions:Input Circuit Dimension: 5x8x12Main Body Dimension 10x12x12------------------------------------------------Color Description for all the circuits.Limegreen Circuit : Controls the direction of the feed-tape and stops the feed-tape for a short while before restarting it again.Lapis Lazuli Circuit : Sends a short pulse just before the feed-tape is about to start to start up again. The pulse is used to read the binary feed-tape. After it has read the tape it sends a binary output towards the decoder.Light Grey Circuit : Whenever you stand on the pressure plate this line sends powers to activate the clock that the feedtape runs on. The power can be cut by the lime wire.Purple Line Circuit : This is the toggle-able clock that gets activated by the grey line. It is a 4 tick clock with a 1 tick pulse. The signal gets split and send to directional input that can get toggled by the lime line.Orange Line Circuit: Powers the counterclockwise movement of the feed-tape.Yellow Line Circuit : Powers the clockwise movement of the feed-tape.White Line Circuit : Distributes the output from the feed-tape towards all the different decoders.Dark Green Line Circuit: Reads the direction feed-tape is spinning and turns it into a 1 or 0 state that also gets send into the decoders.Black Circuit: These are the 5 decoders for the 5 hardwired ordersensitive input colors and directions. Each can read a 5 bit numbers giving 32 possibilities per input. So 5 inputs means 32x32x32x32x32 different combinations which is good for a total of 33.554.432 different combinations.Magenta Circuit: This is the RS nor latch array. It is sequential meaning one latch can only be activated if the latch before it is activated. The Latch is setup in a way that it does not allow the same signal to be send into the same latch twice.Pink Line: This is the reset circuit which resets all the latches is the magenta circuit.Red Line: This is the override circuit. Whenever a latch isn't suppose to be activated but a decoder does have the right combination the red line overrides the decoder causing a reset signal to be send to all the latches.Brown Line: This circuit is needed to allow for 00000 to be a possible number for the decoder. This line toggle the red circuit overriding any input in the decoder. Whenever the feed-tape gets read it unpowers briefly removing the override signal that the red circuit is sending into the decoder.Light Blue Circuit: This is the last latch but is actually a t-flipflop. There wasn't any space for a latch. This flipflop when triggered overrides any signals coming from last decoder. So whatever color you enter at this point will reset the whole thing.Cyan Circuit: This is the output of machine. Redstone Device

items.text: Vanilla mod Lucky block V2.0 [MEGA UPDATE,DOWNLOAD NOW] Redstone Device Map As the title says this is the LUCKY BLOCK MOD in Minecraft VANILLA! Yes, vanilla.Are you tired of mining lots and lots of gold ores without knowing what to do with them?Finally the gold has a good use! Use it to craft your lucky blocks and after mine them to see what present it reserves to you!It works with command blocks and you don't need to install any mod to play with it.The original lucky block mod was invented by Alex Socha get the mod from his page (not to be confused with the vanilla version).What's new in 2.0 version?Everything! The "mod" was remade from zero: the clocks, the disposition of the command blocks, the commands.Here are some main changes, for more info check the update log.- There's no more need to face east when breaking the blocks: now you can face any direction and the drop/event will happen exactly in the position of the block.- Ability to enable or disable random events depending on which one you like more or not. Just right click the signs and make your own lucky block combination.- Now in downloadable map (not in the schematic) there's a lucky block race structure for 3 people.- Added a utility book (obtainable by throwing a snowball on the ground) that allows you to kill items on ground, teleport to the lucky block race or command blocks and to kill slimes.- Now some of the events are interactive with each other: explore traps or kill bosses to obtain special drops that allows you to interact with mobs from other events.- Added a bunch of new items, traps and mobs with a new boss and the incredible 200 stacked Lucky Pigs tower O_o- The structure of the machine is made so it fits in only one chunk. By doing that we can put the machine in the spawn chunk and we'll be able to go everywhere we want in the world without the need to keep chunks loaded: the machine will still work.V1.2 items.title: Steve's Nightmare Suite - The Dark Lord Cometh
items.description: Hello there, ladies and gentlemen. Gray Remnant here. Today, I’m submitting my first contest entry, and it’s for the Penthouse Sweet competition here on PMC. Now, your first question is probably something along the lines of “Gray, what the hell have you done?!?” That is a very pertinent question, and it has a straightf
items.text: Steve's Nightmare Suite - The Dark Lord Cometh Complex Map Hello there, ladies and gentlemen. Gray Remnant here. Today, I’m submitting my first contest entry, and it’s for the Penthouse Sweet competition here on PMC. Now, your first question is probably something along the lines of “Gray, what the hell have you done?!?” That is a very pertinent question, and it has a straightforward answer. I’ve built Steve’s Nightmare Suite.You see, I was thinking about taking the obvious route and building Steve a glorious, posh penthouse suite fit for a king. But then I thought “why do that, when I can just create a chaotic scene of death and destruction?” So, instead of building Steve’s dream suite, I built the exact opposite: his nightmare suite.Why? Because, impossible as it is to imagine, I’m a somewhat twisted person with a very dark turn of mind. Which brings us to your probable second question: “What the hell is this?” With that question in mind, I think now would be a good time for you to read the background lore. Go for it! :DDid you enjoy it? What? You’re mad that I killed off Steve? Pfft, The Walking Dead does crap like that all the time and nobody seems to give a damn. Oh, and by the way, I’d like to dedicate the lore to my good friend, Horwitz1011. Though, he is ten times more evil than the ‘Dr. Horwitz’ depicted in that story. It’s true.So, let’s talk about what this build is exactly. This is the aftermath of a dark ritual that summoned a pandemonic demigod into our world. He is a primeval entity, who shan't be named, and he has sharp teeth, slimy skin, and four long, clubbed tentacles. The immediate effect of the dark lord’s arrival was the destruction of most of the suite, sandstorms that’ve caused a build-up of soul sand on the windows, and the presence of some endoplasmic goo from another dimension (because that always seems to happen in the movies).The process of building this was not dissimilar from the process I underwent to build the Temple of Oum Parkour Course. The process goes something like this:Step 1 - Build a nice, lavish structure with lots of shiny, luxurious interior work.Step 2 - Embrace the dark side, go crazy, and break everything!Step 3 - Add cracked stone brick, cobwebs, hanging moss, vines, iron bars, and cobblestone.Step 4 - Render to perfection.The only difference is that this time I also added a monstrous, inter-dimensional deity. Yes, because Steve’s nightmare wouldn’t be complete without that.Anyway, I’ll stop rambling so you guys can enjoy the build. Be sure to set the time to night, because it's meant to be dark and gloomy (/time set 15000). Thank you very much for your time. I hope you enjoyed my extremely unconventional take on this contest, and I hope it surprised you. If it didn’t, I’ll just have to try harder next time.Don’t forget to toss a few diamonds my way. I’ll see you guys next time when, hopefully, I’ll show you guys something a bit more uplifting and happy than this utterly depressing scene of death and destruction.-Gray Remnant Complex, Lord, Steve, Nightmare, Dark, Contest, Apocalypse, Destruction, Sweet, Penthouse, Suite, Cometh

items.description: Hello,this is a VW bus being Volkswagen's second car model after the VW Beetle (VW Käfer). It sometimes is referred to as Volkswagen Type 2 for this reason.But JEK, why is it so high?Because it often was used by hippies in the 1960s. No, okay, jokes aside. Here's the thing: a VW bus' wheels are not a full meter in diam
items.text: VW Bus Land Structure Map Hello,this is a VW bus being Volkswagen's second car model after the VW Beetle (VW Käfer). It sometimes is referred to as Volkswagen Type 2 for this reason.But JEK, why is it so high?Because it often was used by hippies in the 1960s. No, okay, jokes aside. Here's the thing: a VW bus' wheels are not a full meter in diameter - which they are in Minecraft. So, to build a VW bus in Minecraft with correct proportions, I had to make the whole bus one block taller than I did initially (which caused many problems). Raising its height by one block, making it as big as a truck, solved all my problems instantly and the rest of the design flowed together all by itself. That's why it is so high. I mean tall.If you really wanted to build a 1:1 VW bus, you would have to make the wheels half a block in diameter (cause that's approximately how tall they are in reality), leaving the only option of skulls as wheels. Then the whole design would shrink by a factor of 2, so the bus would end up with the correct height of 2.25 meters and not 4.5 meters.Enjoy! items.text: Concrete Mixer Truck Land Structure Map Hello,this is a concrete mixer truck used for transporting liquid concrete from one place to another. It is equipped with a rotating drum with an auger inside of it. The drum's constant rotation stirs the concrete and keeps it from solidifying.The hardest part about concrete mixers in Minecraft is their drum. But it is equally important to connect the drum to the vehicle properly and keep an eye on the proportions of everything. If the proportions don't fit, the vehicle doesn't look credible.With this concrete mixer truck I tried a new exhaust pipe design and actually found a good use for dragon heads: big air filters and some kind of tank.The overall design is inspired by a concrete mixer LEGO model.If you would like to see an American style concrete mixer truck, I also have a Peterbilt Concrete Mixer Truck!Enjoy! Tilanex Empire, Crystaline Empire, Taris EmpireYear introduced1680 ABS'rGalactic Civil WarXenocide WarShadow Fleet CrisisRolesStrike craft, scoutHistoryThe Buzzirek-class was designed and constructed by Kualin Stardrives, as a superiority fighter for their defense force. It received attention and support from some of the best in starfighter construction: Cyxtess technologies, Lottex Stardrives, Qi’natc SP - and of course, the legendary Zenlian Drives. The Buzzirek went through intense prototype and testing phases, where the most modern and capable technologies were put through rigorous combat trials and stress tests. The resulting starfighter was one of the best ever produced, able to match the Xexon and Jorac classes in performance and durability. The fighter was bought in large quantities by major civilizations in the Galactic Alliance, including the Crystaline Empire and the Tilanex Empire. Constant minor improvements and modifications, coupled with a fairly modular and modifiable layout, allowed the Buzzirek to remain in service for more than a millennia. The Buzzirek came the closest to checking Zenlian Drives' monopoly on starfighter design, and has been heavily featured in documentaries and museums. The ship remains one of Kualin Stardrives' crowning achievements, and made huge profits for the company and its subsidiaries.The Buzzirek did not carry a great numbers of weapons, nor was it significantly more economic than the competition. Instead, the primary draw for the Buzzirek was its two beam cannons - the very first successfully mounted on a starfighter. Utilizing a heat dispersion system built from the ground up, and greatly improved venting systems and gas storage, the starfighter was able to wield twin Zefin CDBw beam cannons on either side of the fuselage. These could maintain a solid beam for two seconds, and put out considerably more power than standard laser cannons. In addition, the beam cannons could fire off-center, and had a well-designed targeting system to help the weapon track a target and maintain contact. This made the Buzzirek a deadly adversary if caught from behind - few fighters had the maneuverability to swing out of the way before being cut through, and the fighter had twin laser cannons to aid in an enemy's destruction. To top off the Buzzirek's destructive capabilities, thirty missiles were housed in a single launcher below the ship.The Buzzirek was equipped with powerful shields; however, in this aspect the ship fell short of competitors. The space needed for a mark three reactor on the small fighter, and the various systems which aided the beam cannons, meant that shielding system size was constrained. The ship had barely enough shield strength to withstand a blow from its own weapons, and was considered somewhat of a glass cannon by its pilots. Fortunately, the Buzzirek had powerful repulsorlifts, inertial systems, and sensors, making evasion and maneuver effortless. The fighter was able to carry a powerful darkspace drive, giving it good range for scouting and patrolling space.. Air Structure, Spaceship, Space, Starfighter

items.text: Venice of the Seas v8.6 (Full Passenger Interiors and Terminal) Water Structure Map This is Venice of the Seas, a large Minecraft Cruise Ship ﻿*New ship, for a winterized cruise full of snow and fun anytime of the years*This ship has many staterooms, resturants, stores, and entertainment venues from theaters to clubs. The ship is fully decorated above the water line including some crew areas and a full spa with private rooms and a sauna. The ship also features a recreation of the SS Normandie's Grande Salle a Manger, and now a collection of the Normandies Veranda Staterooms, just foward the entrance. I would appreciate color references for or even descriptions of the actual color or the dining room and rooms. From foward on the ship will be incorperation elements from the SS Normandie, including the new funnel. Welcome to the Canal The ship is also a community project as you are free to contribute a resturant or shops which you will be accredited for, just follow the instructions in the update logs to find out how to help. If you have an suggestions for what to modify or even add leave a comment and I will read it. This ship is still WIP with a cruise ship terminal under construction so it is not set in stone. Please feel free to contribute to the ship's construction. I utilized Pauplemousse resource pack and McEdit for editing the world with optifine to balance my preformance. items.text: Skymaster stone generator Redstone Device Map Hello guys. Today i decided to release brief tutorial and schematic of my Skymaster stone gen.We know most skyblock servers have hard to obtain redstone. So i did some research on how to get most out of technology. The stone generator uses up ONLY 32 redstone dust including pistons. It have 4 pistons pushing stone on each side, allowing highly efficient coop afk mining. Water streams under stone beams make sure that you pick up every single stone you mined.To build this generator, You will need32 redstone.8 iron ingots.4 lava buckets.12 stone.You must make 4 redstone repeaters, 2 redstone torches, and 8 pistons.Rest of materials are easy to obtain on skyblock and don't need counting. items.text: Piston monorail 2.0 Piston Map I had a lot of positive reactions on the piston monorail, so i decided to make an improvement! This one goes in two directions, just build one train and go back and forth as much as you like!This one is a bit more trikcy to build, so definitely read these notes first!*BUILDING ITThis schematic contains 4 parts, 2 edge sections, and 2 mid sections that you can copy as much as you like. Make sure all the parts are leveled and flush! you should get one straight block in the end.*USING ITPlace a normal and sticky piston facing toward eachother, put about five blocks behind those, and then put another sticky and normal piston, vica versa. The train can in theory take off anywhere on the track, but this may not always work properly. Also do not build much more or less than 5 blocks in between the pistons.Additional NotesAlso check out the 3.0 version: http://www.planetminecraft.com/project/piston-monorail-30/ Redstone, Transport, Train, Piston, New, Ways, Tram, Monorail, Choo, Chugga, Reversable

items.text: Princess 82 Luxury Motor Yacht Water Structure Map Haven't uploaded in awhile but here is my small Princess 82 Yacht. Took me probably around 2 hours to build which was all on a stream on my twitch. This yacht is 82 feet long or ~25.5 meters and around 5.75 meters wide. I tried to cram as much interior as I could but having only 3 blocks to work with wasn't fun, I think I made it work however. I decided to leave out the optional flybridge cover on this one for a more open feel on the flybridge.The boat has 3 bedrooms and plenty of lounging areas. This boat is powered by twin MTU 10v 2000 M94 diesel engines making 1624 mhp each and pushing the yacht to up to 33 knots.If you use this yacht on your server or in a map please be sure to credit me. items.text: Squid Vending Machine! (More Like a Farm) v.1 Released!! Complex Map It is completed!!! Pictures above! There are some bugs, so don't expect above the top extraordinary. It is pretty awesome, it is just that sometimes the squid get stuck in the walls and stuff. When playing around with it check around the building because when the squids get stuck they die and their stuff either goes in the tank or out side.Feedback is Aprreciated :DFrom a recent happening, I had found squid in my vending machine (see here). They kept getting stuck and such which I used to my advantage for entertainment :) Anyway!! Inspiration has struck it's magic! I have had the amazing idea to have a Squid Vending Machine Farm!!! Bun Bun Buhhh!!!! It will dispense Squid, thus you can do whatever you want with. Of course you can't pick them up and put them in your inventory... (I wish) but you could kill them for ink sacks, you could push 'em around, you can make some sort of mod or find a mod that allows you to ride them. I DON'T KNOW THE POSSIBILITIES ARE ENDLESS!!!Things Included In The Vending Machine Farm/Whats Completed:Squid: 100%Other: 100%Building: 100%Idea: 100% evolved!Status: Working!NOTICE:I have decided I don't really want to build a system where when you pull a lever a squid comes swimming down. That may come out in a future update but not in version 1. So instead it is going to be a Squid Farm!! You go there, you pick out a squid, and then do whatever you want with it! Ideas of what you could do:You could build a little river leading to the ocean and set it free, or that could make it easier to rideRide the squidKill the squidPush the squidEat the squid (?)Annoy the squidDance with the SquidPOSSIBILITIES ARE ENDLESS!!Additional NotesYes I know this is stupid, I just wanna do it. items.text: Boss Battle: Athesiel's "The Phoenix Dragon" (EnderDragon Commandblock Extension) Challenge / Adventure Map UPDATE 1: ADDED PARTICLES TO THE SECOND HALFUPDATE 2: ADDED SCHEMATIC (FULLY UPDATED TO U3)UPDATE 3: ADDED ABILITY TO RELIGHT CRYSTALS DURING SECOND HALFUPDATE 4: ADDED THE PHOENIX DRAGON TEXTURE TO PMCKEEP IN MIND: The World Save has a full set of armor for you, and several others, as well as two books explaining both the battle and the map. The Schematic only initiates the battle, if you do not want to download the World Save.Inspired by this ( https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rGfffCsiaUE )This variant of the Phoenix Dragon, named Ophus Khol, is a much more exciting variant, and offers a much more intense battle. As much as I would love to dive in to the mechanics behind it, I do not wish to spoil exactly what differences exist. However, if you must know, they will be contained in, well, a spoiler.Spoiler - Click to Reveal, though it will ruin the fun.Attacks:Firebolt: Ophus Khol will launch a terrain-diminishing firebolt at the player.Flaming Curtain: Ophus will leave a path of fire wherever he flies.Traditional Ram: Ophus will ram the player directly, as Ender Dragons do.Defenses:Living Scales: Ophus will shed its scales, the World Formers, to attack the player and terraform the land to Ophus's will.Crystal Regeneration: Ophus will, like the Ender Dragon, regain health from the Ender Crystals.Rebirth: Ophus will, as a final defense, rebirth himself from his own ashes once defeated, to give a final battle; in this final battle, Ophus will shoot out 3x the amount of firebolts, and summon 3x the amount of World Formers; Ophus also now has a chance to relight crystals that have been destroyed.This is multiplayer compatible.Good luck.Want the Ender Dragon to look like a Phoenix Dragon variant? Use this texture in a resourcepack under assets\minecraft\textures/entity\enderdragon! Adventure, Challenge, Battle, Dragon, Difficult, Phoenix, Ender

items.text: Skelly Sniper Tower of DOOM Challenge / Adventure Map Why, hello there!Here's a little schematic to a sniper tower, which truly churns out Skeletons. items.text: [DISCONTINUED] The Outbreak - Zombie Apocalypse Adventure Map Challenge / Adventure Map [DISCONTINUED]Unfortunately my .minecraft was abruptly deleted due to corruption of multiple files, and I have lost all of my work, including the saves of this and other worlds. I am very angry and sad about this, and I'm sure you are too.Welcome SurvivorsThe Outbreak is a Zombie Apocalypse Adventure/Survival Map, based in Randell City, a once sprawling metropolis booming with towering skyscrapers and happy residents, but now a zombie infested wasteland. Battle hordes of the undead with scavenged supplies, or explore the vast city looking for anything of interest. If you look forward to this map, remember to Comment and/or Diamond and/or Favorite if you want.It keeps me encouraged to do more!For a little bit of an Outbreak preview, feel free to download the Greenhouse Schematic for MC Edit, which I will hopefully incorporate into the map!Remember Survivors... Kill or be Killed!Click to revealOn 23rd August 2003, the zombie virus known as The Outbreak hit Randell City and all it's inhabitants. This infection spreads like wild fire, converting anyone it comes into contact with and has claimed the lives of over 1,000,000 people. Few people remain, like myself, fighting for their lives in the abandoned city. Random supplies have been dropped around the city, and many of us don't dare to go and scavenge them. All of us that are left are either holed up in shelters or out fighting, trying to find anything valuable, like water and food. I've only got a few magazines worth of ammo left, a couple bottles of clean water and some essentials. Soon, I'll have to go outside, risk myself for what's left out there.If anyone receives this, tell the world about this tragedy, put the city in lock-down so it doesn't spread, and most importantly, if it does get out; stay together, fight strong and don't give up.My name is Andy Gilbert, and this is my message.Additional NotesAmazing Texture Pack by Santiago3: www.minecraftforum.net/topic/787848-32x32-14x-the-end-is-extremely-nighvanilla-over-200000-downloadsfeatured-on-curse/ City, Zombie, Survival, Adventure, Challenge, Outbreak, Virus, Apocalypse, Randell

items.text: Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry Minecart Map Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantryLow Altitude Assault Transport/infantryProduction informationManufacturerRothana Heavy EngineeringClassGunshipTransportStarfighterBomberTechnical specificationsLength17.69 metersHeight/depth6.94 metersMaximum atmospheric speed620 kphArmamentPair of Laser cannonturrets (Chin-mounted)Pair of laser-beam turrets (optional)Pair of Rocket Launchers (Dorsal surface)Missile belts (Rear-mounted)CrewPilot (1)Co-pilot/Gunner (1)Gunner (2-4)(optional)Passengers30UsageRole(s)Infantry transportAir-to-ground supportAir-to-air supportYear introduced22 years before the Battle of YavinAffiliationGalactic RepublicRepublic militaryGrand Army of the RepublicRepublic NavyGalactic EmpireImperial MilitaryImperial NavyAlliance to Restore the RepublicThe Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry (LAAT/i), also known as the Low Altitude Assault Transport, Republic attack gunship or Assault Gunship, was a gunship used by the Grand Army of the Republic during the Clone Wars. Its role was to transport troopers as well as offering air-to-ground and air-to-air support for the Republic against the Separatists.After the formation of the Galactic Empire, the remaining LAAT/is were absorbed into the Imperial Navy.During the Galactic Civil War, LAAT/is were used by the Alliance to Restore the Republic against Imperial garrisons.A variant of this gunship, the Low Altitude Assault Transport/carrier, was often used to transport a single All Terrain Tactical Enforcer.Another version was modified to function within the vacuum of space.After the First Battle of Geonosis several LAAT/i gunships were modified by removing the side-mounted turrets in order to make more room for the sliding doors.Years after the Clone Wars, another model of low-altitude transport, the low-altitude Imperial transport, was used by the remnant of the Galactic Empire led by Grand Moff Lozen Tolruck on the planetKashyyyk. It is of a pass-through design so it can be in the middle of a room and/or daisy-chained near multiple copies. Either side of each floor has a call button and an up or down button. The buttons a
items.text: Pass-Through Elevator Piston Map The elevator is 2W x 2L x 3H and the whole construct is 8W x 12L x 27H. There are two floors with a distance of seven blocks. It is of a pass-through design so it can be in the middle of a room and/or daisy-chained near multiple copies. Either side of each floor has a call button and an up or down button. The buttons are timed so the first piston doesn't trigger until after the button depresses, providing plenty of time to board the elevator.It's color-coded for easy customization: Glowstone are floor and ceiling of elevator, Light Blue Wool are floors, Cyan Wool are aesthetic walls and ceilings, Red Wool power pistons, Yellow Wool path buttons to beginning of piston chain, and Black Wool block undesirable redstone circuitry.I spent a lot of time tweaking blocks to fit all the buttons within my space constraints. My goal was to make it as compact as possible so it would fit well in the middle of a circular room.Additional Notesuse of SinglePlayerCommandstexture pack: DokuCraft_2.5_Light Piston, Elevator, 3x2x2, Passthrough

items.text: Minecraft Adventure Map - "The Sunblade" - Prologue Challenge / Adventure Map Minecraft Adventure MapThe Sunblade"Prologue"﻿Preffered Texture Pack https://www.johnsmithlegacy.co.uk/DescriptionYou lived a normal, quiet, easy life. Everything was fine in the world and then three weeks ago you left on a Hunting Trip. Upon returning home you discover that something has fell from the sky and landed in the middle of your village. Soon enough, upon request of your Uncle you have in your possession one of the greatest blade's every fashioned by the human hand and it is your sole responsibility to deliver it to its rightful owner and stop a war between Kingdoms before it can start.-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Future InformationBefore playing the map I must stress that this maybe should not be described as an Adventure Map. It is more of an Introduction Map. All of the following information can also be found at the end of the map.The purpose of the map is to introduce an idea of a project I plan on starting. I will be attempting to create a series of Adventure Map's which will follow an Episodic Narrative and will continue and eventually conclude the story that I have started in this prologue. It goes without saying that I would love to create maps that are on a much larger scale than this one but this would take a long time if it was just myself and I doubt I would ever have enough time or skill to finish it. I would like to consider myself a good builder and writer but I have no skills in texturing or redstone really which is why I have created this map.I am planning to put a team together to help create this set of Adventure Maps. As you will notice when you join the map it is very rough. The world is randomly generated, not created using programs such as Voxel Sniper. I have tried to create a small realistic world to set this part of the story in but when it comes to things like command blocks I do not have much experience. Within this map I have attempted to use them in some of their most basic forms and one of the firt things you'll notice is that I was not capable of even hiding the pressure plates/tripwires which set them off which is once again why I am trying to recruit a team.To conclude, I am looking for builders, players skilled with redstone and command blocks, writers, texturers and more who would be interested in helping me. If so you can either PM me on here on add me on Skype at Brodie456 and express interest in helping with the map. I will try to reply as quick as possible. If you are planning on showing an interest in helping either message me straight away or play the map and see what you think. If not, feel free to play the map anyway and leave any opinions or constructive points below in the comments.Thank you for reading and hopefully I will hear from some of you soon.-Brodie456 Adventure, Challenge

But that makes going down more and more difficult the further you want to go down and also consumes more time (compared to going up).But after I had seen this YouTube video (an update of this one so credits to ThisHampsterman) I knew it is po
items.text: 8 block high elevator Piston Map At first I tried to make a elevator with only sticky pistons (at the bottom). But that makes going down more and more difficult the further you want to go down and also consumes more time (compared to going up).But after I had seen this YouTube video (an update of this one so credits to ThisHampsterman) I knew it is possible to make an elevator with only "pushing" pistons.In this elevator I used that technique to its limits (with a 3 block high elevator chamber) because a piston is limited to push maximum 12 block.The buttons in the elevator is placed two blocks back because it otherwise one of the hatches would close (what does not looks nice). And, I think because of system lag, sometimes not the entire elevator reaches the bottom, but after pressing the "call button" again it will arrive entirely. Piston

items.text: Stay in Line - 2D Minecraft Challenge / Adventure Map What if, in this entire beautiful world... your entire life was a line?Introducing a new Minecraft Survival Challenge Map! Welcome to Stay in Line! This is 2D Minecraft - all you have is X and Y.Player movement is restricted to their own "line" - their own Z coordinate. You can mine in your line, or whatever you can reach - but good luck getting the dropped items!The map is multiplayer ready, so you can play it with your friends. items.text: All Terrain Tactical Enforcer Minecart Map All Terrain Tactical Enforcer All Terrain Tactical EnforcerProduction informationManufacturerRothana Heavy EngineeringModelAll Terrain Tactical EnforcerClassWalkerTechnical specificationsLength22.02 metersHeight/depth9.57 metersArmamentLaser cannon turrets (6)Mass-driver cannon(1)ComplementAll Terrain Recon Transports (2)Passengers20UsageAffiliationGalactic RepublicGrand Army of the RepublicGalactic EmpireImperial MilitaryImperial ArmyAlliance to Restore the Republic Skywalker: "Activate those walkers, Admiral."Yularen: "You are not thinking of using those to transport the clones to that frigate."Tano: "Well, they are pressurized…"Rex: "And they're equipped with magnetic feet. Mm. Good call."Tano: "Master, you're a genius."Yularen: "Those walkers are designed for terrain, not space!"Skywalker: "Rex, load 'em up."―Anakin Skywalker, Ahsoka Tano, Wulff Yularen, and Captain Rex debate the use of AT-TE walkers aboard the ResoluteThe All Terrain Tactical Enforcer (AT-TE), also referred to as a tankby clone troopers, was a multipurpose military ground walker used by the Galactic Republic during the Clone Wars. They boasted six legs that could be magnetized, six laser cannon turrets located along the body of the walker, and a heavy projectile mass-driver cannon on top.ContentsCharacteristicsFront view of an AT-TE walkerThe All Terrain Tactical Enforcer was a low-built vehicle that featured six articulated legs for propulsion. Its body consisted of two armored halves that were connected by a flexible concertina section, which increased the walker's mobility on the field. Because its legs were low to the ground, the walker had a relatively low top speed, but its also enjoyed greater stability. As its name suggests, the AT-TE was suitable for all terrains; not only was it able able to climb sheer surfaces, but it could also survive in the vacuum of realspace. The AT-TE measured 22.02 meters in length and 9.57 meters in height.The AT-TE's most powerful weapon was a single mass-driver cannon located on the vehicle's dorsal surface. Four smaller ball-turret laser cannons were mounted at the front, and two others at the rear. The hexapod's armor could easily deflect small arms fire. The AT-TE could be pierced by tanksmasher rockets, which could result in the destruction of the vehicle's complex propulsion mechanisms.The walker's pilot sat in a forward compartment, while a gunner sat exposed atop the walker to operate the mass-driver cannon.The standard version of the AT-TE carried 20 troops,and some variants carried smaller All Terrain Recon Transports in their rear hold.Their crews were filled out by an IM-6 medic droid, who attended to any injured clone troopers.History[img]blob:https://www.planetminecraft.com/d5d026ea-214e-4c18-8994-9b24caababec[/img]Built by Rothana Heavy Engineering,the All Terrain Tactical Enforcer became the principal battle tank of the Grand Army of the Galactic Republic during the Clone Wars.A blast from an AT-TE was Clone Commander Cody's chosen method in executing Jedi General Obi-Wan Kenobi when received Order 66, but the blast only succeeded in knocking Kenobi into water, and he later escaped to safety.A Rebel AT-TEFifteen years after the end of the Clone Wars, Captain Rex, along with Commander's Wolfe and Gregor, were living in a modified AT-TE on Seelos. They, along with the Lothal Rebels, later used the tank to evade Imperial forces, which consisted of three All Terrain Armored Transport walkers. The tank was able to destroy one AT-AT in the sandstorm before Rex ordered a direct assault on the other two while the Rebels escaped. The Mass-driver cannon, unfortunately, was not strong enough to penetrate the AT-AT armor. The AT-TE was able to sustain multiple shots from both walkers before Wolfe drove it into one of the walkers. The cannon was temporarily knocked out, but Gregor was able to restore power when the rebels returned and hijacked one of the AT-ATs, giving Rex the opening to shoot the last walker in the neck. The AT-TE was destroyed when the AT-AT collapsed on it.Several AT-TEs were later modified by Rebel Alliance mechanics in order to be used as an attack vehicle during the Galactic Civil War. A number were modified with thicker armor and more powerful armament, becoming known as Elite AT-TEs.At least one AT-TE was used in the Imperial defense of the Kuat Drive Yards. items.text: DeathSwap for 3 players Challenge / Adventure Map 3 Player DeathSwapHave you ever wondered is there a way to play SethBlings DeathSwap map with 3 people? Well now there it is!Drumbledore's Army modified the original DeathSwap game by adding one more player to it. Now you can enjoy the game with another friend, with no mods required. As you need one Player to be the teleport dummy you need to have at least 4 Players in the server to play. 3 player DeathSwap is a minigame where 3 players compete for life and death. At the beginning players teleport for a very long distance away from each others. First you must gather some wood to get the other people killed. As the game is in progress swaps will happen in random period of times. The players basically swap to each others locations at the same time, and that way you have to kill the others.To play just use our example map or import the .schematic into any world near spawn.Don’t forget to enable Commandblocks in your server.properties too.Make sure to leave a diamond if you really liked it, it would really help us out! :) Adventure, Challenge
